requirement_topic.en: NC Electrical Safety Standards — Dual-Voltage System (110 V and 220 V, 60 Hz) and Type A/B Plug Compatibility
requirement_topic.zh: NC电气安全标准——双电压系统（110V和220V，60Hz）及A/B型插头兼容性
requirement_topic.zht: NC電氣安全標準——雙電壓系統（110V和220V，60Hz）及A/B型插頭相容性

summary.en: Cuba operates a dual-voltage electrical system: 110 V / 60 Hz is predominant in residential settings (a legacy of pre-revolution US electrical infrastructure), while 220 V / 60 Hz is used in many commercial and industrial installations. Both systems use Type A (ungrounded two-blade) and Type B (grounded two-blade with round ground pin) plugs, consistent with the US/Canada standard. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices intended for the Cuban market must be electrically safe and compatible with the applicable Cuban supply voltage — a 100–240 V universal input is strongly recommended. Electrical safety is governed by applicable NC (Normas Cubanas) standards harmonised with IEC/ISO, administered by ONN (Oficina Nacional de Normalización). Electrical safety test data consistent with IEC 62368-1 (or predecessor IEC 60950-1) are typically accepted within the MINCOM homologación technical file, given Cuba's limited domestic accredited electrical safety test lab capacity. The device label must clearly indicate rated voltage, frequency, and power consumption in Spanish.
summary.zh: 古巴采用双电压电气系统：110V/60Hz在住宅场所占主导（美国革命前电气基础设施的遗留），而220V/60Hz用于许多商业和工业场所。两种系统均使用A型（未接地双刀）和B型（带圆形接地柱的接地双刀）插头，与美国/加拿大标准一致。面向古巴市场的Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备须在电气安全方面符合要求，并与适用的古巴供电电压兼容——强烈建议采用100–240V通用输入。电气安全由ONN（国家标准化办公室）管理的、与IEC/ISO协调的适用NC（古巴国家标准）规范。鉴于古巴国内认可电气安全检测实验室能力有限，符合IEC 62368-1（或前身IEC 60950-1）的电气安全检测数据在MINCOM型式认可技术文件中通常被接受。设备标签须以西班牙语清晰标注额定电压、频率和功耗。
summary.zht: 古巴採用雙電壓電氣系統：110V/60Hz在住宅場所佔主導（美國革命前電氣基礎設施的遺留），而220V/60Hz用於許多商業和工業場所。兩種系統均使用A型（未接地雙刀）和B型（帶圓形接地柱的接地雙刀）插頭，與美國/加拿大標準一致。面向古巴市場的Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置須在電氣安全方面符合要求，並與適用的古巴供電電壓相容——強烈建議採用100–240V通用輸入。電氣安全由ONN（國家標準化辦公室）管理的、與IEC/ISO協調的適用NC（古巴國家標準）規範。鑑於古巴國內認可電氣安全檢測實驗室能力有限，符合IEC 62368-1（或前身IEC 60950-1）的電氣安全檢測數據在MINCOM型式認可技術文件中通常被接受。裝置標籤須以西班牙語清晰標注額定電壓、頻率和功耗。

standards_or_laws: NC (Normas Cubanas) electrical safety standards — harmonised with IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1; administered by ONN (Oficina Nacional de Normalización)
IEC 62368-1 (adopted via NC) — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety standard
Cuba dual-voltage supply: 110 V / 60 Hz (residential) and 220 V / 60 Hz (commercial/industrial)
Plug types: Type A (NEMA 1-15) and Type B (NEMA 5-15) — US/Canada standard; prevalent in Cuba
MINCOM homologación technical file — electrical safety section required

summary.en: China uses a 220 V / 50 Hz single-voltage electrical system with Type I (Australian-style angled flat-blade) and Type A plugs in some regions, but predominantly Type I. Electrical safety for IT and communication equipment in China is governed by GB 4943.1 (harmonised with IEC 60950-1) and, for newer categories, GB/T 20600 or the updated IEC 62368-1 equivalent. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) requires electrical safety testing by a CNCA-designated laboratory against applicable GB safety standards. Chinese devices rated 220 V / 50 Hz may not be directly compatible with Cuba's 110 V / 60 Hz residential supply without a step-down transformer or universal input power supply.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz单电压电气系统，部分地区使用I型（澳大利亚式斜平刀）和A型插头，但以I型为主。中国IT和通信设备电气安全由GB 4943.1（与IEC 60950-1协调）以及较新类别的GB/T 20600或更新的IEC 62368-1等效标准规范。CCC（中国强制认证）要求由CNCA指定实验室依据适用GB安全标准进行电气安全检测。额定220V/50Hz的中国设备若无降压变压器或通用输入电源，可能无法直接与古巴110V/60Hz住宅供电兼容。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz單電壓電氣系統，部分地區使用I型（澳大利亞式斜平刀）和A型插頭，但以I型為主。中國IT和通信設備電氣安全由GB 4943.1（與IEC 60950-1協調）以及較新類別的GB/T 20600或更新的IEC 62368-1等效標準規範。CCC（中國強制認證）要求由CNCA指定實驗室依據適用GB安全標準進行電氣安全檢測。額定220V/50Hz的中國設備若無降壓變壓器或通用輸入電源，可能無法直接與古巴110V/60Hz住宅供電相容。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment electrical safety (harmonised with IEC 60950-1)
GB/T 42768 / IEC 62368-1 equivalent — Audio/video, IT and communication equipment safety (newer framework)
China supply: 220 V / 50 Hz; plug types: Type I predominantly, Type A in some regions
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — mandatory electrical safety assessment for applicable consumer electronics

gap.en: Cuba's dual-voltage system (110 V and 220 V, both 60 Hz) creates two specific gaps for China-made devices: (1) Voltage compatibility — Chinese devices rated only for 220 V / 50 Hz may not operate safely on Cuba's 110 V / 60 Hz residential supply; universal 100–240 V / 50–60 Hz input is strongly recommended. (2) Frequency — Cuba uses 60 Hz (not 50 Hz as in China); devices with frequency-sensitive components (motors, clocks) must be verified for 60 Hz compatibility. Plug type adaptation is needed: Cuba uses Type A/B plugs; Chinese devices typically ship with Type I or Type A plugs. NC electrical safety standards apply rather than Chinese GB standards; CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised by MINCOM. IEC 62368-1-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are typically accepted in the MINCOM technical file.
gap.zh: 古巴双电压系统（110V和220V，均为60Hz）为中国制造设备带来两个具体差距：（1）电压兼容性——仅额定220V/50Hz的中国设备可能无法在古巴110V/60Hz住宅供电下安全运行；强烈建议采用100–240V/50–60Hz通用输入。（2）频率——古巴使用60Hz（而非中国的50Hz）；含频率敏感元件（电机、时钟）的设备须核验60Hz兼容性。须进行插头类型适配：古巴使用A/B型插头；中国设备通常配I型或A型插头。适用NC电气安全标准而非中国GB标准；CCC电气安全认证不被MINCOM承认。来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1基础检测报告在MINCOM技术文件中通常被接受。
gap.zht: 古巴雙電壓系統（110V和220V，均為60Hz）為中國製造裝置帶來兩個具體差距：（1）電壓相容性——僅額定220V/50Hz的中國裝置可能無法在古巴110V/60Hz住宅供電下安全運行；強烈建議採用100–240V/50–60Hz通用輸入。（2）頻率——古巴使用60Hz（而非中國的50Hz）；含頻率敏感元件（電機、時鐘）的裝置須核驗60Hz相容性。須進行插頭類型適配：古巴使用A/B型插頭；中國裝置通常配I型或A型插頭。適用NC電氣安全標準而非中國GB標準；CCC電氣安全認證不被MINCOM承認。來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1基礎檢測報告在MINCOM技術文件中通常被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NC electrical safety compliance required as part of MINCOM homologación technical file; device must be compatible with Cuba's applicable supply voltage (110 V or 220 V, 60 Hz); Spanish-language labelling of rated voltage and frequency required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4943.1 (or IEC 62368-1 equivalent) electrical safety compliance required as part of CCC assessment for applicable consumer electronics; China supply is 220 V / 50 Hz

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cuba's dual-voltage system (110 V and 220 V, both 60 Hz) with Type A/B plugs creates both safety and compatibility requirements distinct from China's 220 V / 50 Hz system. A universal input (100–240 V / 50–60 Hz) power supply is strongly recommended. NC electrical safety standards apply; IEC 62368-1-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are typically accepted by MINCOM. CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised. Verify voltage/frequency compatibility and applicable NC standards for the specific device category with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 古巴使用A/B型插头的双电压系统（110V和220V，均为60Hz）产生了与中国220V/50Hz系统不同的安全和兼容性要求。强烈建议采用通用输入（100–240V/50–60Hz）电源。适用NC电气安全标准；来自国际认可实验室的IEC 62368-1基础检测报告通常被MINCOM接受。CCC电气安全认证不被承认。发货前请与合格监管专业人士核验具体设备类别的电压/频率兼容性和适用NC标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 古巴使用A/B型插頭的雙電壓系統（110V和220V，均為60Hz）產生了與中國220V/50Hz系統不同的安全和相容性要求。強烈建議採用通用輸入（100–240V/50–60Hz）電源。適用NC電氣安全標準；來自國際認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1基礎檢測報告通常被MINCOM接受。CCC電氣安全認證不被承認。發貨前請與合格監管專業人士核驗具體裝置類別的電壓/頻率相容性和適用NC標準。
